headline: A Look At General Electric’s (GE) Valuation As Defense Wins And Engine Demand Support Recent Momentum
summary: General Electric (GE) stock is in focus after GE Aerospace secured a U.S. Air Force contract to advance the GE426 engine through preliminary design review, highlighting investor interest in the company’s defense and autonomous systems exposure. See our latest analysis for General Electric. GE’s recent Air Force win comes as the 30 day share price return of 13.3% and a 7 day gain of 7.2% signal strengthening short term momentum, set against a 1 year total shareholder return of 31.9% and a very...
